name: Concours de Cuisine (Culinary Confrontation)
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｃｏｎｃｏｕｒｓ ｄｅ Ｃｕｉｓｉｎｅ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コンクール・ド・キュイジーヌ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>～<ruby lang="jp"><rb>菓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>冷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>料</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>理</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>対</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>決</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>～
name_jp_rom: Konkūru Do Kyuijīnu ~ Kareinaru Ryōri Taiketsu ~
name_jp_tl: Concours de Cuisine ~ Culinary Confrontation of Cold Confectionery ~
desc: Choose 1 "Nouvelles" Pendulum Monster and 1 "Patissciel" Pendulum Monster from your hand, Deck, and/or Extra Deck, and Special Summon both monsters, 1 to each field, also this turn, you cannot use monsters as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon, except "Nouvelles" and "Patissciel" monsters. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 200 ATK for each "Recipe" card in the GYs. You can only use each effect of "Concours de Cuisine (Culinary Confrontation)" once per turn.
eff: Choose 1 "Nouvelles" Pendulum Monster and 1 "Patissciel" Pendulum Monster from your hand, Deck, and/or Extra Deck, and Special Summon both monsters, 1 to each field, also this turn, you cannot use monsters as material for a Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Summon, except "Nouvelles" and "Patissciel" monsters. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster on the field; it gains 200 ATK for each "Recipe" card in the GYs. You can only use each effect of "Concours de Cuisine (Culinary Confrontation)" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Special Summons from your hand to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your Deck to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your Extra Deck to your opponent's field
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
